definition: A common English greeting used when meeting someone.
A greeting used in the morning before noon.
example_sentence: Good morning! Did you sleep well?

definition: What you say when leaving or ending a conversation.
An expression of gratitude or appreciation.
A polite word used when making a request.
An expression of apology or regret.
A word used to express agreement or confirmation.
A word used to express disagreement or refusal.
A clear, tasteless liquid essential for life.
example_sentence: Please give me a glass of water.

definition: Any substance that is eaten to provide energy and nutrition.
A place where students go to learn.
example_sentence: I go to school every day.

definition: A job or place of employment; also the activity of doing a job.
example_sentence: I go to work at 8 AM.

definition: A building where people live.
A group of people related by blood or marriage.
A person you know well and like.
A person whose job is to instruct or educate others.
example_sentence: Our English teacher is very kind.

definition: A person who is studying at a school or university.
example_sentence: Every student must bring a pencil.

definition: A written or printed work consisting of pages bound together.

definition: A writing instrument that uses ink.
A piece of furniture with a flat top supported by legs.

definition: To know the meaning of something; to comprehend.
To do something repeatedly in order to improve a skill.
To become or make something better.
example_sentence: I want to improve my vocabulary.

definition: To bring something back into your mind; to not forget.
To fail to remember something.
example_sentence: I forgot my umbrella at home.

definition: Having great significance or value.
example_sentence: It is important to sleep well.

definition: Not easy; requiring effort or skill.
Not difficult; requiring little effort.
Arousing curiosity or attention; holding your interest.
Not interesting; making you feel bored.
example_sentence: The lecture was a bit boring.
